title: npm audit vulnerabilities found
remediation: Run npm audit fix; review breaking changes manually

title: No package lockfile
description: No package-lock.json or yarn.lock — dependency versions not pinned
remediation: Run npm install to generate lockfile and commit it

title: Wildcard dependency version
description: package.json uses * for dependency version — any version installs
remediation: Pin to specific version or use ^ with known-good version
